title: Allophylus nitidulus
taxonomy: Allophylus nitidulus is classified under the family Sapindaceae, which includes a variety of trees and shrubs commonly known as soapberry or soapbark trees. This classification places Allophylus nitidulus within the order Sapindales, which consists of flowering plants that produce fruit. The genus Allophylus is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Allophylus nitidulus specifically belongs to the kingdom Plantae, encompassing all types of plants. This classification highlights the plant's botanical identity and its relationships to other organisms within the plant kingdom.
